decisions.summary: Prioritize DAG canvas front-loading per user directive. Fix edges first, then duplicate entries, then node enrichment, then gate nodes.
Removed vbrief/state/prd ActionKeys from Command Deck surface entirely — they remain as ZoneCOverview tabs only. Updated ALL_ACTION_KEYS, surface registry, legacy action map, and all tests.
SessionNode phase icons use toolNameToPhase() from workingPhase.ts to map currentTool → Lucide icon. Spinner phases get animate-spin.
IssueHeader pipeline redesigned from 8px dots to prominent StagePills with icons, colors, glow effects, and connecting lines.

hazards.summary: Pre-existing test failures in integration/cli tests unrelated to frontend changes. 12 root-level tests fail but all frontend tests pass.
hazards.mitigation: Only frontend test results matter for dashboard changes.

resumePoint.description: Claim pan-979-enrich bead and enrich PlanDAG work item nodes with bead progress bar, agent assignment, duration/cost, inspection status, and improved status animations (glow for running, pulse for unblocked).

sessionHistory.note: Fresh session. Created 4 beads for PAN-979. Prioritizing DAG edges and Overview integration per user directive.
Closed pan-979-dedup: removed duplicate vBRIEF/STATE/PRD from ZoneActionStrip and OverviewTab quick links. Updated tests.

Closed pan-979-edges: front-loaded PlanDAG into OverviewTab with 520px section. Improved edge visibility (thicker strokes, brighter colors, edge count header). Removed vbrief/state/prd ActionKeys and updated all parity tests.
Added rich PhaseIcon to SessionNode in ProjectTree — maps currentTool via toolNameToPhase() to Lucide icons. Committed.
Redesigned IssueHeader pipeline from 8px dots to bold StagePills with icons, glow, and connecting lines. Committed.
